title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Porter

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Porter
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Porter. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Logistics Manager to strengthen our Rajkot-based team.

About Porter:
Porter is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Fleet Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Porter!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
